content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Fixed Point Removal". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1405/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: Print the number of fixed points removed.

solution.approach: Iterate through the array and count the number of fixed points.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
count = 0
for i in range(n):
    if arr[i] == i:
        count += 1
print(count)
